statement: In every magma, Equation 1372 (`x = y * (((z * y) * y) * z)`) implies Equation 4543 (`x * (y * z) = (z * x) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0426
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z y) y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op z x) w)
